name: Discord
description: Monitor Discord server for team membership and communication access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to https://discord.com/developers/applications and create a new application
2. Go to Bot section, click Reset Token, and copy the token
3. Under Privileged Gateway Intents, enable Server Members Intent
4. Go to OAuth2 > URL Generator, check "bot" scope, then check "View Channels" permission
5. Copy the generated URL, open it in your browser, and select your server
6. Enable Developer Mode in Discord (User Settings > Advanced), right-click your server name, Copy Server ID
7. Enter the bot token and server ID below

credentialFields.label: Bot Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Discord Developer Portal > Your App > Bot > Token

credentialFields.label: Server (Guild) ID
credentialFields.helpText: Right-click your Discord server name > Copy Server ID (enable Developer Mode first)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Discord server members with access to team communication channels
